name: 19 fl oz Glass Bower Tall Tumbler Gray - Threshold™
description: Bring an elegant touch to your drinkware with the 19-Fluid-Ounce Glass Bower Tall Tumbler from Threshold™. This tall tumbler features a see-through design for an elevated look. Made of glass, this gray tumbler is suitable for cold beverages. Best of all, it is dishwasher safe for easy cleanup.                                                                   Threshold™ Looks like home, feels like you.
